properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v2 v3 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For this cause I came, For this purpose I was born, That I will manifest the life of the living God, It's not my will but thine oh Lord, So I lay it all on the altar, That my life may be a sacrifice, Offered unto thee.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I was born to declare your life, And reason of your death, Here I am to pay the price, Fully surrendering to your will, I only want dear Lord, To be surrendered unto thee.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In this age we see Through the opening of the word, That we must overcome all life's challenges, The pride of life, the lust of the flesh and the lust of the eyes, And stand to manifest the life of Jesus Christ.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Lord you say unto your Prophet, Be more sincere, He spoke and did create with word, Let there be, All of these great things that you did in this life, I will see in its fullness as, Your life unfolds in mine.
